ogTitle: Tiwi Islands vs Tortilla Flats: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tiwi Islands and Tortilla Flats.
heading: Tiwi Islands vs Tortilla Flats — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tiwi Islands, Northern Territory and Tortilla Flats, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tortilla Flats has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Tiwi Islands (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tiwi Islands or Tortilla Flats safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tiwi Islands has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Tortilla Flats scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tiwi Islands scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Tortilla Flats scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tiwi Islands or Tortilla Flats?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tortilla Flats has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
